title.rendered: 🏡 SPACIOUS 5-BED HOME WITH EXPANSIVE GARDEN & PATIO IN PERLA MARINA

content.rendered:
This stunning home features five spacious bedrooms and five modern bathrooms, offering plenty of space for a large family or guests. Each bedroom is well-lit with large windows, and the bathrooms are equipped with contemporary fixtures, ensuring comfort and style.

The highlight of this property is the expansive garden and outdoor space. The garden is beautifully landscaped, providing a serene environment for relaxation and outdoor activities. There’s ample space for children to play, gardening enthusiasts to cultivate plants, or for hosting outdoor gatherings.

In addition to the garden, the outdoor area includes a large patio, perfect for dining al fresco or enjoying the fresh air. Whether you’re entertaining guests or spending quality time with family, this home’s outdoor space offers endless possibilities for enjoyment and leisure.

Located in a desirable neighborhood, this home offers convenience and accessibility to local amenities such as schools, shops, and parks. The property provides a peaceful retreat while still being close to everything you need. This five-bedroom, five-bathroom home with its large garden and outdoor space is the perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and functionality, making it an ideal choice for your next home 🏡.

title.rendered: 🌊 SPACIOUS RENOVATED STUDIO WITH OCEAN VIEW

content.rendered:
Discover your perfect getaway in Sosúa! This fully renovated, move-in-ready studio offers modern comfort with ocean views. Located in the serene Los Cerros neighborhood, this hilltop retreat is just 5 minutes from the famous Sosúa Beach. Whether you’re seeking a personal hideaway or a vacation rental investment, this 46-square-meter studio is an ideal choice.

Property Highlights

  • 🌴 Fully renovated and move-in ready
  • 🛋️ Comes fully furnished
  • 🌊 Ocean views from the hilltop location
  • 🏊 Common pool for relaxation and leisure
  • 💡 Backup generator for uninterrupted living
  • 📐 46 m² (495 sq. ft.) of well-designed space
  • 💰 Low HOA fee: Only 4,000 pesos/month (~$70 USD)
  • 🚶 5 minutes to Sosúa Beach and local amenities

Community & Area Details:
Los Cerros is a tranquil, elevated neighborhood in Sosúa known for its lush surroundings, gentle breezes, and breathtaking views. While secluded, it’s conveniently close to the vibrant town center, offering shops, restaurants, and nightlife. Sosúa Beach, with its golden sands and crystal-clear waters, is just a short drive away.

About the area:

Airport Distance:

  • Gregorio Luperón International Airport (Puerto Plata): 15 minutes

Don’t miss out on this incredible opportunity to own a stylish studio in one of the most desirable locations in Sosúa. Contact us today to schedule a viewing!

title.rendered: 🏡 BEAUTIFUL 3-BEDROOM HOME IN GATED COMMUNITY IN PUERTO PLATA

content.rendered:
Located in the gated Residencial El Dorado, Puerto Plata, with 24/7 private security and surveillance, this beautiful home is ready for you to move in and enjoy!

With 170 m² of construction and 261.68 m² of land, this spacious property offers comfort, modernity, and all the amenities you need.

Property Highlights:

  • Living and Dining Room: A spacious and welcoming area, perfect for relaxation and entertaining.
  • Large Kitchen: With ample space for cooking and storage.
  • 3 Bedrooms: Including a master suite with a private bathroom and a walk-in closet finished with wood.
  • Shared Bathroom: For the two additional bedrooms.
  • Gallery: A lovely and welcoming area.
  • Covered Double Carport: Side-by-side, providing ample parking.
  • Terrace: A perfect place to relax and enjoy the outdoors.
  • Water Cistern: Ensuring a consistent water supply.
  • Laundry Room: Convenient and functional.
  • Imported High-Quality Porcelain Floors
  • Jequitivá Wood Doors: Elegant and durable.
  • Perimeter Fence & Entry Gate: Offering privacy and security.

Enjoy the peace of mind of living in a gated community with 24/7 security, just minutes away from the best beaches, including Playa Dorada, and a renowned 18-hole golf course. You’ll be only 10 minutes from supermarkets, dining, shopping malls, private schools, medical centers, and downtown Puerto Plata. The Gregorio Luperón International Airport is just a 20-minute drive away.

Don’t miss this opportunity to own your ideal home in the beautiful Residencial El Dorado. Contact us today to schedule a viewing!

title.rendered: 🌊 SPECTACULAR LUXURY PENTHOUSE WITH PANORAMIC OCEAN VIEWS IN CABARETE

content.rendered:
Rarely does a property of this caliber become available! Nestled in the prestigious Ocean Dream complex in Cabarete, this 442 m² beachfront penthouse is the epitome of luxury living. Combining breathtaking design, exclusive amenities, and unmatched ocean views, this property delivers a lifestyle of sophistication and relaxation.

🏡 Property Highlights

  • Unrivaled Ocean Views – Every bedroom, the living room, and even the office space (convertible to a 4th bedroom) boast direct ocean views.
  • Master Suite Elegance – Spacious walk-in closet, en-suite bathroom with double sinks, shower, and a private jacuzzi overlooking the beach.
  • Expansive Living Space – A grand open-concept layout featuring a billiards entertainment area, a dining area, and a fully equipped kitchen.
  • Wraparound Balcony – Enjoy panoramic beach views, perfect for watching sunsets or hosting gatherings.
  • Artistic Flair – Adorned with $100,000 worth of curated paintings and sculptures, and coral stone walls for a tropical, sophisticated touch.
  • Additional Guest Apartment – A separate guest apartment for visitors, ensuring their comfort and privacy.
  • Double Garage – Secure parking and storage for vehicles or outdoor adventure gear.

✨ Luxury Details

As you step into this penthouse, you’re greeted by a sunlit, open-concept layout that highlights its stunning oceanfront setting. The expansive living room flows seamlessly into the dining area and a fully equipped kitchen, perfect for entertaining. A billiards table adds a touch of fun to your evenings, while the wraparound balcony offers unobstructed views of Cabarete Bay—a scene that feels straight out of a postcard.

The master suite is a true showstopper with a 360-degree ocean view, creating the ultimate retreat. Two additional bedrooms are equally well-appointed, offering comfort and style for guests. The office space provides versatility and can easily function as a fourth bedroom for larger families.

Sophistication is in every detail—coral stone walls lend a tropical yet refined ambiance, while the curated artwork adds uniqueness and personality to every corner of this luxurious home.

🌴 Lifestyle & Amenities

  • Direct beach access for sunbathing, surfing, or walking to Cabarete’s lively beachfront restaurants.
  • World-class kiteboarding and wingboarding available steps from your door.
  • 24/7 security and surveillance ensure peace of mind for you and your family.

This property is more than just a home—it’s a gateway to the laid-back yet vibrant lifestyle Cabarete is famous for.

HOA Fee: $1,950/month (includes electricity).

About the area:

Location & Accessibility

Ocean Dream’s prime location means you’re just steps from Cabarete’s best restaurants, beach clubs, and outdoor activities.

  • Gregorio Luperón International Airport (Puerto Plata): 30 minutes.
  • Santiago International Airport (Cibao): 90 minutes.
  • Las Américas International Airport (Santo Domingo): 3.5 hours.

Don’t miss this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to own a slice of paradise! Schedule a viewing today and experience luxury living like never before. 🌊

content.rendered:
This exceptional 3-bedroom, 4-bathroom Penthouse Condo in Playa Cofresi, Dominican Republic, offers an unparalleled experience with breathtaking views of 🏝️ Cofresi Bay and the stunning peninsula. 🌅

As you enter this remarkable condo, you’ll be immediately struck by the elegant spiral marble stone staircase that leads up to the second floor. 🌀 This architectural masterpiece adds a touch of sophistication to your living space.

Each of the three spacious bedrooms comes with its own private balcony, allowing you to wake up to the captivating beauty of the Caribbean every morning. 🌴🌅 The ensuite bathrooms provide both convenience and privacy, ensuring a comfortable stay for you and your guests.

The open-concept design of this penthouse seamlessly integrates the living, dining, and kitchen areas. 🍽️ The well-equipped kitchen boasts modern appliances and ample counter space, making it a joy for cooking enthusiasts. Whether you’re preparing a gourmet meal or simply enjoying a quick snack, this kitchen has you covered. 🍳

This condo is fully furnished with tasteful tropical-themed hardwood furniture, reflecting the island’s laid-back charm. 🏝️ It’s turnkey and move-in ready, making it the perfect choice for your vacation home or a savvy investment property. With a history of strong rental returns, you can effortlessly generate income when you’re not enjoying the condo yourself. 💰

The opportunity to own this remarkable piece of paradise is priced to sell quickly, so don’t wait too long to make your move. With its exceptional features and prime location, this condo won’t be on the market for long. Seize this chance to experience the beauty of the Dominican Republic from your own piece of heaven! 🏖️🏡

title.rendered: ☀️ SUNNY COASTAL CONDO IN LA MARIPOSA COMMUNITY

content.rendered:
Discover the epitome of coastal living with this spacious 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom condo located in the heart of the La Mariposa community, just minutes away from the beach. 🌊

Key Features:

  • Prime Location in La Mariposa: Nestled in the vibrant and growing La Mariposa community, this condo offers the perfect blend of convenience and relaxation. Enjoy easy access to the beach, local shops, restaurants, and entertainment venues, all within a stone’s throw away.
  • Spacious Bedrooms: The bedrooms in this condo are generously sized, providing ample space for rest and relaxation after a day of beachside adventures. Wake up refreshed and rejuvenated, ready to seize the day.
  • Surf and Yoga Schools: Embrace the laid-back coastal lifestyle with nearby surf and yoga schools, perfect for beginners and enthusiasts alike. Whether you’re catching waves or finding your zen, there’s something for everyone just steps from your door.
  • Food Park: Indulge your taste buds at the nearby food park, offering a diverse array of culinary delights from around the world. From fresh seafood to gourmet tacos, satisfy your cravings without ever having to venture far from home.
  • Ideal for Rental or Airbnb: With its prime location and desirable amenities, this condo presents an excellent opportunity for rental income or Airbnb hosting. Capitalize on the booming tourism industry and turn this property into a lucrative investment.
  • Community Amenities: Take advantage of community amenities such as swimming pools, fitness centers, and recreational facilities, providing endless opportunities for leisure and recreation right at your fingertips.
  • Scenic Views: Relax and unwind on your private balcony, where you can soak in panoramic views of the surrounding La Mariposa community and catch glimpses of the sparkling ocean in the distance.

🇩🇴 About the Area 

Playa Encuentro, a vibrant community on the North Coast of the Dominican Republic, is renowned for its surfing scene and sustainable growth. Situated conveniently between Cabarete and Sosua, it offers easy access to amenities and attractions. Surrounded by lush scenery and a friendly atmosphere, it attracts surfers, families, travelers, and professionals alike. The neighborhood boasts a variety of dining options, recreational facilities, and a thriving beach culture. With recent developments including new condominiums and ongoing growth plans, Playa Encuentro remains a sought-after destination for residents and visitors alike.

Major Airports ✈️

  • 20 minutes from Gregorio Luperón International Airport (POP) 
  • 1: 45 hours from Santiago de los Caballeros International Airport (STI)
  • 4 hours from Las Américas International Airport (SDQ) in Santo Domingo

Don’t miss out on this chance to own a slice of paradise in the thriving La Mariposa community. Whether you’re seeking a permanent residence, vacation getaway, or investment property, this condo has it all. Schedule a viewing today and start living the coastal lifestyle of your dreams.

title.rendered: Great Investment Opportunity In La Boca

content.rendered:
An exceptional investment opportunity to acquire your own boutique hotel in East Cabarete, La Boca neighbourhood.

This property is located just a quick 7-minute walk to the beach and only a short drive to the center of Cabarete. It offers immense potential for investors seeking to capitalize on the growing tourist demand in the La Boca and Cabarete area.

The building and the swimming pool sit on 1,174 m2 of land.

The hotel features 18 apartments consisting of six 2-bedroom and twelve 1-bedroom suites with their own bathrooms and balconies. There is a large common area with space for a restaurant and bar as well as a street front retail shop.

The property has been cleaned up and most electrical work has been completed. This boutique hotel property is waiting for the finishing touches to be restored to it’s prime glory. Don’t miss this chance to own a resort business in one of the fastest growing tourist areas in the Dominican Republic.

title.rendered: OCEAN VIEW STUDIO IN SOSUA 🌊 | GREAT VALUE & FULLY FURNISHED

content.rendered:
Looking for an affordable slice of paradise? This budget-friendly studio in Los Cerros, Sosua, offers ocean views and all the essentials for comfortable Caribbean living. This fully furnished studio is perfect as a vacation getaway, rental property, or cozy home base.

Property Highlights
🌅 Ocean View – Enjoy sea views right from your window.
🏊 Common Pool – Relax by the pool in a peaceful, well-kept complex.
🔋 Back-Up Generator – Reliable power for worry-free living.
🚗 Parking Space – Convenient, dedicated parking included.
🏢 Lobby Area – Welcoming common area with security and convenience.
💲 Low HOA Fee – Just 3,000 pesos/month for maintenance and amenities.

The studio is fully furnished, and move-in ready. The bathroom has been recently upgraded, adding a modern touch to the space. With everything included, this unit is truly turn-key—just bring your suitcase! Whether you’re relaxing by the pool, watching the ocean, or exploring the vibrant town of Sosua, this studio offers an ideal, low-maintenance lifestyle.

Why Choose Los Cerros, Sosua?
Los Cerros is a peaceful neighborhood just minutes from Sosua’s lively beach scene, restaurants, and shops. Known for its beautiful hillside views, the area offers tranquility with easy access to the excitement of downtown Sosua and nearby Cabarete.

Easy Payment & Investment Potential
With a low HOA fee and affordable price, this studio has excellent rental potential. Sosua’s popularity with vacationers ensures steady demand, making this property a smart investment choice.

Airport Accessibility
✈️ Puerto Plata Airport (POP) – 15 minutes
✈️ Santiago Airport (STI) – 1 hour 25 minutes

Don’t miss out on this budget-friendly ocean view studio! It’s rare to find a property with such amenities, views, and price in Sosua. Contact us today to schedule a showing or to learn more about this fantastic opportunity!

title.rendered: 🌊 OCEANFRONT CONDO FOR SALE IN LAS TERRAZAS, SOSÚA

content.rendered:
This stunning 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom condo is located on the 3rd floor of the sought-after Las Terrazas complex, right across from Playa Alicia in Sosúa, Puerto Plata, offering breathtaking ocean views. With 126 m² of living space, the condo features:

  • Master Suite with a private bathroom, walk-in closet, and a private balcony overlooking the ocean.
  • Second Bedroom with a private balcony offering views of the pool area.
  • High Ceilings and large windows that allow for plenty of natural light and fresh air throughout the space.
  • Spacious Terrace facing the ocean, perfect for enjoying the tropical breeze.
  • Fully Furnished and equipped with air conditioning, ceiling fans, kitchen appliances, and a vintage-inspired decor with a touch of modernity, keeping the original victorian balcony doors, windows and restored kitchen cabinets.

The complex offers amenities including:

  • Gated Entrance and Private Security
  • Private Parking
  • Swimming Pool

This is an opportunity for anyone looking for an oceanfront retreat in one of the most desirable areas of the Dominican Republic, perfectly located in the heart of Sosua and steps away from Playa Alicia.

🇩🇴 About the Area 

Sosúa is a city within the Puerto Plata province in the Dominican Republic, a versatile destination ready to cater to your every whim. Sosúa offers a fresh start, attracting expats from all corners of the globe who have found a new home here. It’s a vibrant hub for tourism, sports, business, and a laid-back lifestyle. Just a short distance from Cabarete, known as the water sport capital of the Dominican Republic.

With its warm weather, Sosúa boasts beaches that offer breathtaking views and delectable food served right on the sandy shores. Playa Sosúa, often referred to as a natural pool due to its calm waters, is one of the most popular beaches on the North Coast, renowned for its stunning sunsets. For a quieter beach experience, Playa Chiquita and Playa Alicia along the same coast are cherished by locals, offering serene spots to enjoy the day or soak in the sunset. 

Sosúa outshines Cabarete in terms of amenities, with a wide range of options including restaurants, hospitals, shops, hotels, supermarkets, and more. Major supermarkets like Super Pola, conveniently located near our office, and Playero, offering a diverse range of North American, European, and specialty foods from around the world, ensure you have everything you need. 

Sosúa offers a vibrant lifestyle and a plethora of conveniences, making it an enticing destination for those seeking an enjoyable and fulfilling experience. Whether you’re looking to settle down, embark on an adventure, or simply unwind, Sosúa has it all. So come and discover the charms of this remarkable city in the Dominican Republic! 

✈️ Major Airports 

  • Sosúa enjoys convenient access to major airports, ensuring easy travel connections for residents and visitors alike:
  • 17 minutes from Gregorio Luperón International Airport (POP)
  • 115 minutes from Santiago de los Caballeros International Airport (STI)
  • 4 hours from Las Américas International Airport (SDQ) in Santo Domingo
